holdings.infoBox: JGLO is an equity ETF with a total of 85 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.11%, Microsoft at 4.59%, Amazon.com at 4.58%, Alphabet at 4.43%, and Apple at 3.61%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Global Select Equity ETF Global Select Equity ETF (JGLO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through an active management that invests in stocks of any capitalization located in both developed and emerging markets. The selection process integrates ESG factors. JGLO was launched on Sep 13, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
